hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.command // ""' | grep -q "git commit" && echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PostToolUse","additionalContext":"A git commit just landed. Review whether .claude/project-memory/references/project-status.md still reflects reality (done vs. remaining) and update its date if a milestone changed; if nothing material changed, do nothing."}}' || true
